## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's partnership with Exec and discuss strategies for SEO and LLM content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec is seeing strong results in LLM visibility, dominating their category for AI roleplays](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [GrowthX's content strategy aligns well with Exec's goals for long-tail content and LLM ranking](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Potential collaboration on creating customized use case landing pages for Exec's self-serve flow](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [High satisfaction with GrowthX's work, particularly praising Elvis and Nem's contributions](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

## Topics

### LLM Ranking Strategy

  - [Exec's goal: Rank in LLMs through long-tail content production](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Using Profound (competitor to Crunch) for LLM visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Seeing dominance in their category, attributed to:](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [Focus on new, frequently published content](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [LLMs' bias towards fresh content](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [Expansion of search TAM by 10x due to LLMs' ability to handle complex queries](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

  - [Customers attributing finds to SEO](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Focus on roleplays niche showing success](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Statistics-type posts getting good engagement](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

      - [Targeting specific roles, industries, and company sizes](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
      - [Aiming for highly personalized content](https://fathom.video/share/7sFxc98ZY-oa65VAsZb6ry4mtRshvA7r?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
